news.title: Microsoft (MSFT) And Chevron Build A Huge Power Backing For AI Data Centers
news.summary: Chevron and Microsoft announced a large co-located natural gas power plant and data center project in the US, focused on supporting AI infrastructure. The project is designed to secure dedicated energy capacity for Microsoft's growing AI data center workloads. The development plans to use non-freshwater sources and is expected to have a meaningful economic impact on the surrounding region.
